label: Local visibility down
atomicSentence: Visibility in local search or map results has declined.

label: GBP optimization issue
atomicSentence: Google Business Profile is incomplete or poorly optimized.

label: SEO leads down
atomicSentence: Leads or calls from organic search have declined.

label: Traffic but low conversions
atomicSentence: Traffic exists but visitors are not converting.

label: Indexing issue
atomicSentence: Important pages may not be indexed correctly.

label: Site speed issue
atomicSentence: Slow page speed may be hurting SEO or user experience.

label: General technical SEO issue
atomicSentence: Crawlability, metadata, canonical, redirect, or structured technical problems exist.

label: Content gap
atomicSentence: The site lacks enough useful content for target topics.

label: Content quality issue
atomicSentence: Existing content is weak, outdated, duplicated, or not satisfying search intent.

label: Backlink authority weak
atomicSentence: The site lacks strong backlink authority compared with competitors.

label: Competitor backlinks stronger
atomicSentence: Competitors have significantly stronger backlink profiles.
